gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XT (radeonsi, navi31, LLVM 19.1.7, DRM 3.57, 6.8.0-52-generic)
notes:
Unfortunately, after the most recent update, the game stopped working on Linux. It launches with Proton-GE 10-15 and reaches the menu, but before even pressing the button to search for a match, an anti-cheat error appears and the game immediately closes.

Before this update, the game was playable on Linux using the workaround of copying Strinova anti-cheat files together with custom launch options. Now, that method is broken, and online play is not possible on Linux.
title: Delta Force
